issues.description: Effect completely misrepresents the card. DSL only includes FlipLife (1 card), but the actual effect has three distinct steps: (1) Add 1 card from top of deck to top of Life cards, (2) Look at all Life cards, (3) Place 1 card at top of deck and rest back to Life area in any order. This is a complex multi-step effect that cannot be expressed as a single FlipLife action.

Missing actions for the search/rearrangement mechanic. The effect requires searching your Life cards, selecting 1 to place on top of deck, and reordering the rest back to Life area—none of which are captured in current DSL.
